student_modification: Adapted logic, renamed variables, added paper equation references, restructured for notebook format
declaration: I confirm that all LLM interactions listed here are complete and accurate. All implementation decisions, ablation choices, and interpretations are my own.

interactions.prompt: Help me implement the SGD-QN algorithm from Figure 2 of the paper in Python
interactions.response_summary: Provided skeleton structure; student adapted with proper paper references and equation annotations

interactions.prompt: Why is my SGD-QN implementation numerically unstable (NaN)?
interactions.response_summary: Identified t0 too small causing huge initial learning rate; recommended t0 ~ 1/lambda

interactions.prompt: How should I implement the leaky average update for B: Bii <- Bii + (2/r)(ratio_i - Bii)?
interactions.response_summary: Explained vectorised numpy implementation and safe division handling

interactions.prompt: What is the squared hinge loss and why does the paper use it instead of standard hinge?
interactions.response_summary: Explained C2 differentiability requirement from Section 2.1

interactions.prompt: How do I implement the skip scheduling trick from SVMSGD2?
interactions.response_summary: Explained the lazy regularisation decoupling from Section 3
